ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop (e.g., Teff, Barley, Wheat, Maize, Sorghum) */,
  "seasonality" TEXT /* Seasonal trends in crop yields */,
  "growth_duration" INTEGER /* Crop's growth duration in days */,
  "maturity_days" INTEGER /* Days to maturity for each crop */,
  "yield_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for yield (e.g., tons per hectare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., All, North, South) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type (e.g., tropical, temperate, arid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop being tracked */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone where the crop was grown */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the yield data was recorded */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of land used for the crop in the given year */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield of the crop in the given year */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the growing season */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil used for each crop */,
  "fertilizer_used" TEXT /* Type and amount of fertilizer used */,
  "pesticide_used" TEXT /* Type and amount of pesticide used */,
  "irrigation_type" TEXT /* Type of irrigation used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's institution or organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department within the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* User's last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the yield data */,
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yield record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the yield data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser type, version) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_yield_id FOREIGN KEY ("yield_id") REFERENCES crop_yields ("yield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yield_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop being forecasted */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone where the crop is being forecasted */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the yield is being forecasted for */,
  "forecasted_yield" REAL /* Forecasted yield of the crop in the given year */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Forecasting model used */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "forecast_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_forecasts_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_forecasts_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)
